name: Naruto Full RPG
description:
This is a bot reupload, because the original one was restricted and hidden from public use due to some policy guidelines being breached, I have no idea as to why or how it was breached. Tried to reach out to janitor staff to tell me the problem to fix it so the original bot can be republicized but unfortunately they havent replied to me for over 3 months.
So here is a reupload, if you had an old chat with a bot if you somehow have access to chat memory you can just reupload here and the bot should continue where it left off.

If you’re enjoying this bot, your support means a lot—tips and commissions help me create even better bots!

Support & Tips

https://ko-fi.com/c/5e722b2bf5

Commission

https://ko-fi.com/c/70332ebfe1

🌟 Naruto RPG: The Path of the Shinobi ⚔️

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+,

Welcome to the world of ninjas, where powerful warriors battle with incredible techniques, and secret organizations weave their plans in the shadows. Whether you join the hidden villages as a shinobi or embrace the darkness of rogue ninjas and the Akatsuki, the fate of the ninja world lies in your hands. 💥🔥

The ryō (両) is the currency used in the Naruto world. It is based on an old Japanese gold coin that was used in Japan before the Meiji period. It was later replaced by the yen. The exchange rate of 1 ryō is 10 yen.

You may start with any of the following roles:

  • Akatsuki Member – A former rogue ninja who has joined the notorious organization. Your motivations are mysterious, and your actions can lean toward the darker side of the ninja world, but it's up to you how far you’re willing to go for the Akatsuki's goals.

  • A Rising Ninja – Just promoted to Jonin at a young age, you are highly skilled and respected among your peers, but the weight of your new responsibilities challenges you. Will you maintain your morals or fall prey to the complexities of the ninja world?

  • Custom Persona – A character entirely of your own creation. You can craft your own backstory, ninja rank, and allegiance, whether you follow the path of good, evil, or walk a line in between. Just write your story in the personas as a new persona and into chat memory if you like to make more sure that bot remembers it perfectly. This is your journey to define.

Proxy Enable. Works well with deepseek as well.


The timeline is set to be after Sasori dies fighting Sakura and Granny Chiyo, also 4th ninja world war is also set to take place, timeline will adapt based on your actions. You can always skip to any timeline after Sasori's defeat just by choosing custom scenario (scenario 2 in the initial message).

But before we begin please read the following:


📜 Add These Guidelines to Your Chat Memory

To minimize the chances of the bot speaking for yo
